name: sahne-js-monorepo
description: A tool designed for testing and debugging that uses Puppeteer's interceptor to proxy the desired requests to an internal development server from any specified URL.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace sahne-js && npm run build:sahne-js && npm run typecheck --prefix tests
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run build --prefix playground/vite-8-react-ts-app && npm run test:pack

author: Kerem ATAM
